reviews.comment:
Deberían contar con ak menos 2 vendedores de playa en el turno noche. En plena temporada turística con un solo vendedor es interminable la cila de espera. El vendedor muy atento y servicial.

(Translated by Google)
They should have at least two beach vendors on the night shift. During peak tourist season, with only one vendor, the wait is endless. The vendor was very attentive and helpful.
